title: rebulobivia einsteinii
side_effects: Rebulobivia einsteinii can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. Prolonged exposure to its toxins can lead to damage to the liver and kidneys, causing symptoms like jaundice and kidney failure. In extreme cases, improper use of rebulobivia einsteinii can even cause seizures, coma, or death. Additionally, its toxins can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure or diabetes.
